rulings.Case Title: EUGENIA LOPEZ et al VS. U.S. BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 24 2012, line 3. Defendants' Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Second Amended Complaint. Second cause of action, sustain with leave to amend to comply with Khoury; Third cause of action overrule; and Fourth cause of action, sustain with leave to amend to allege breached contract provision or contract. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERIN ELLIS et al VS. SUSANNA SHAW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Susanna Shaw'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 24 2012, line 10. Defendant Susanna Shaw'S Demurrer To Complaint. 1) Sustain with leave to amend as to CODORO to allege causation and damages; 2) Sustain with leave to amend to allege breached contract provision. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERIN ELLIS et al VS. SUSANNA SHAW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Susanna Shaw'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 24 2012, line 10. Defendant Susanna Shaw'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' Complaint. 1) Moot as to CODORO; 2) Grant with leave to amend as to San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.9. = (501/REQ)
